creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

X crashes when I log into Windows 10 VM when "Display -> Screen -> Acceleration: Enable 3D Acceleration & Enable 2D Video Acceleration" are turned on.

[   397.167] (EE) 
[   397.167] (EE) Backtrace:
[   397.169] (EE) 0: /usr/local/bin/X (?+0x0) [0x400a20]

Thank you in advance for any help with the issue.
